start: ^Clinic Personel: Welcome to the Health and Services Center.
continue_1: ^Clinic Personel: This area houses the University Medical Clinic.
continue_2: ^Clinic Personel: The Medical Clinic is the primary health facility of BukSU.
continue_3: ^Clinic Personel: It provides primary health care services for students, faculty, and staff.
continue_4: ^Clinic Personel: With professional and proficient staff, they ensure proper wellness and medical management for health-related concerns.
continue_5: ^Clinic Personel: They can also refer patients to appropriate facilities when further medical care is needed.
continue_6: ^Clinic Personel: The Health and Services Center also includes the University Dental Clinic.
continue_7: ^Clinic Personel: The Dental Clinic offers primary and selected specialized dental services for the BukSU community.
continue_8: ^Clinic Personel: Services include tooth extraction, consultation, referrals, vitamin C distribution, and free fluoride varnish for teaching and non-teaching personnel.
continue_9: ^Clinic Personel: It is staffed by trained and registered professional health personnel to ensure quality care.
